Hover a region to confirm, then tell me which ID = hands

p2 – left arm area
p3 – left upper arm
p4 – throwing arm (open path)
p5 – shoulder pad front
p6 – main body/torso
p7 – main legs outline
p8 – waist/belt
p9 – left shoe
p10 – right shoe
p11 – right shoulder
p12 – helmet
p13 – left calf/sock
p14 – right calf/sock
p15 – left upper leg
p16 – right upper leg
p17 – chest detail
p18 – collar
p19 – facemask
